name: in-home-care-platform
description: npm task runner for local dev operations — conda venv + docker stacks + middleware + portals

scripts.setup:local:all: npm run setup:local:venv:create && npm run setup:local:venv:install && npm run setup:local:docker:up
scripts.setup:local:venv:create: bash -c 'VENV=$HOME/runtime_data/python_venvs/In-Home-Care-Platform; if [ ! -d "$VENV" ]; then echo "[venv] creating conda env at $VENV"; conda create -y -p "$VENV" python=3.13; else echo "[venv] reusing $VENV"; fi'
scripts.setup:local:venv:install: bash -c 'VENV=$HOME/runtime_data/python_venvs/In-Home-Care-Platform; "$VENV/bin/pip" install --upgrade pip && "$VENV/bin/pip" install -r requirements.txt && echo "[venv] all dependencies installed"'
scripts.setup:local:venv:activate: bash -c 'echo "Run this in your shell:"; echo ""; echo "  conda activate $HOME/runtime_data/python_venvs/In-Home-Care-Platform"; echo ""; echo "Or for non-conda:"; echo "  source $HOME/runtime_data/python_venvs/In-Home-Care-Platform/bin/activate"'
scripts.setup:local:venv:deactivate: bash -c 'echo "Run this in your shell:"; echo ""; echo "  conda deactivate"; echo ""; echo "Or for non-conda:"; echo "  deactivate"'
scripts.local:middleware:start-all: bash -c 'VENV=$HOME/runtime_data/python_venvs/In-Home-Care-Platform; PIDS=""; PORT=8001; for svc in api_gateway auth_svc member_svc appointment_svc visit_management_svc visit_ingest_svc document_intelligence_svc mcp_gateway; do echo "Starting $svc on :$PORT"; $VENV/bin/uvicorn ${svc}.main:app --host 127.0.0.1 --port $PORT --app-dir middleware/Microservices/$svc/src > /tmp/ihcp_${svc}.log 2>&1 & PIDS="$PIDS $!"; PORT=$((PORT+1)); done; echo $PIDS > /tmp/ihcp_middleware.pids; echo "All middleware started (ports 8001-8008). PIDs in /tmp/ihcp_middleware.pids"'
scripts.local:middleware:stop-all: bash -c 'if [ -f /tmp/ihcp_middleware.pids ]; then kill $(cat /tmp/ihcp_middleware.pids) 2>/dev/null; rm -f /tmp/ihcp_middleware.pids; echo "All middleware stopped"; else echo "No PID file found"; fi'
scripts.local:middleware:status-all: bash -c 'if [ -f /tmp/ihcp_middleware.pids ]; then for pid in $(cat /tmp/ihcp_middleware.pids); do if kill -0 $pid 2>/dev/null; then echo "PID $pid: running"; else echo "PID $pid: not running"; fi; done; else echo "No PID file found — middleware not started"; fi'
scripts.local:portals:start-all: bash -c 'PIDS=""; PORT=3001; for portal in portals/web_apps/member_portal portals/web_apps/care_admin_portal; do NAME=$(basename $portal); echo "Starting $NAME on :$PORT"; cd $portal && npx vite --host 127.0.0.1 --port $PORT > /tmp/ihcp_${NAME}.log 2>&1 & PIDS="$PIDS $!"; PORT=$((PORT+1)); cd - > /dev/null; done; echo $PIDS > /tmp/ihcp_portals.pids; echo "Portals started (ports 3001-3002). PIDs in /tmp/ihcp_portals.pids"'
scripts.local:portals:stop-all: bash -c 'if [ -f /tmp/ihcp_portals.pids ]; then kill $(cat /tmp/ihcp_portals.pids) 2>/dev/null; rm -f /tmp/ihcp_portals.pids; echo "All portals stopped"; else echo "No PID file found"; fi'
scripts.local:portals:status-all: bash -c 'if [ -f /tmp/ihcp_portals.pids ]; then for pid in $(cat /tmp/ihcp_portals.pids); do if kill -0 $pid 2>/dev/null; then echo "PID $pid: running"; else echo "PID $pid: not running"; fi; done; else echo "No PID file found — portals not started"; fi'
scripts.local:start-all: npm run setup:local:docker:up && npm run local:middleware:start-all && npm run local:portals:start-all
scripts.local:stop-all: npm run local:portals:stop-all && npm run local:middleware:stop-all && npm run setup:local:docker:down
scripts.local:status-all: npm run setup:local:docker:status && npm run local:middleware:status-all && npm run local:portals:status-all
scripts.teardown:local:all: npm run local:stop-all && npm run setup:local:venv:destroy
